reason: Final verification against global TianChen-RV architecture invariants and RVV Stage 2 scope.
Final verification of RVV packed-i4 selected-body/resource remediation, provider-owned facts, and mirror-only boundaries.
Final verification that Common EmitC remains neutral and no RVV semantics moved into common lowering.
Final verification that focused tests cover positive resource facts and stale fail-closed behavior without unsupported performance claims.
Final locality checklist for plugin-owned selected-body/resource planning.
Final compute-boundary checklist for avoiding descriptor, metadata, artifact-name, or route-id authority.

commands.cmd: rtk ninja -C build tianchenrv-rvv-extension-plugin-test tianchenrv-target-artifact-export-test tcrv-opt tcrv-translate
rtk git diff -U0 -- include lib test | rtk rg -n "^\\+.*(RVVI32M1|rvv-i32m1|tcrv_rvv\\.i32_|!tcrv_rvv\\.i32m|source-front-door|descriptor-driven|q4|q8|llama|Common EmitC|__riscv_.*_i32m1)" || true

self_repair: Updated hand-authored packed-i4 C++ fixtures after provider validation correctly failed closed on missing remediation plan fields.
Updated lit FileCheck order to match actual route metadata ordering.
Added remediation plan keys to RVVTargetSupportBundle so header export mirrors provider-owned metadata.
runtime_evidence: Not run; this Gate 1 slice does not claim new executable correctness or performance beyond existing evidence.
